# Internet Speed Test
> Free broadband speed testing tool

Internet-Speed-Test.app is a free tool for testing your internet connection speed. Measure download speed, upload speed, ping latency, and jitter in seconds. No signup or installation required. Powered by Bolt Bunny.

## Features
- Download speed test (Mbps)
- Upload speed test (Mbps)
- Ping/latency measurement (ms)
- Jitter measurement (ms)
- AIM Score (Aggregated Internet Measurement) for overall connection quality
- No ads or tracking
- No signup required
- Works on all devices and browsers
- PWA support for mobile home screen

## Use Cases
- Check if your ISP is delivering promised speeds
- Diagnose slow internet connections
- Compare speeds across different networks
- Test connection before video calls or gaming
- Verify WiFi performance in different rooms

## For Advanced Features
For test history, scheduled testing, detailed reports, and API access, use Bolt Bunny (boltbunny.app).
